special_abilities.desc: If the tarrasque is targeted by a Magic Missile spell or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll 1d6. On a 1-5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected and reflects the spell, turning the caster into the target.

special_abilities.name: Siege Monster
special_abilities.desc: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The tarrasque makes one Bite attack and three other attacks, using Claw or Tail in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 15 ft. 36 (4d12 + 10) Piercing damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition and can't teleport.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 15 ft. 28 (4d8 + 10) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 30 ft. 23 (3d8 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Thunderous Bellow (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: con DC 27, each creature and each object that isn't being worn or carried in a 150-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. {@actSaveFail} 78 (12d12) Thunder damage, and the target has the Deafened and Frightened conditions until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary_actions.name: Onslaught
legendary_actions.desc: The tarrasque moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Claw or Tail attack.

legendary_actions.name: World-Shaking Movement
legendary_actions.desc: The tarrasque moves up to its Speed. At the end of this movement, the tarrasque creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 60-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from itself. Creatures in that area lose Concentration and, if Medium or smaller, have the Prone condition. The tarrasque can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Siege Monster
special_abilities.desc: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The treant makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 5 ft. 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Hail of Bark
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +10, range 180 ft. 28 (4d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Animate Trees (1/Day)
actions.desc: The treant magically animates up to two trees it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same Initiative count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The triceratops makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 5 ft. 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is Huge or smaller and the triceratops moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Stench
special_abilities.desc: con DC 12, any creature (other than a troglodyte) that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the troglodyte. {@actSaveFail} The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all troglodytes for 1 hour.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the troglodyte has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the troll ends any turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 Exhaustion level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains Hit Points.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: The troll regains 15 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The troll makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The blight has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the blight's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The tyrannosaurus makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 10 ft. 33 (4d12 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17). While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition and can't be targeted by the tyrannosaurus's Tail.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 15 ft. 25 (4d8 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Fiendish Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the ultroloth dies outside Gehenna, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Gehenna.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The ultroloth has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The ultroloth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Alter Self, Clairvoyance, Detect Magic
1/day each: Dimension Door, Fireball (level 5 version), Wall of Fire

special_abilities.name: Fiendish Guile (Recharge 4-6)
special_abilities.desc: The ultroloth casts Dispel Magic, Invisibility (self only), Misty Step, or Suggestion, requiring no Material components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The ultroloth uses Hypnotic Gaze and makes two Mercurial Whip attacks.

actions.name: Mercurial Whip
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 15 ft. 25 (6d6 + 4) Force damage, and the ultroloth can teleport the target up to 10 feet to an unoccupied space the ultroloth can see that isn't in the air.

actions.name: Hypnotic Gaze
actions.desc: wis DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. {@actSaveFail} 10 (3d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the start of the ultroloth's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this ultroloth's Hypnotic Gaze for 24 hours.

name: Unicorn

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the unicorn fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The unicorn has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The unicorn casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Druidcraft
1/day each: Calm Emotions, Dispel Evil and Good, Entangle, Pass without Trace, Word of Recall

special_abilities.name: Unicorn's Blessing (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc:
The unicorn touches another creature with its horn and casts Cure Wounds or Lesser Restoration on that creature, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The unicorn makes one Hooves attack and one Radiant Horn attack.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Radiant Horn
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Radiant damage.

legendary_actions.name: Charging Horn
legendary_actions.desc: The unicorn moves up to half its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack, and it makes one Radiant Horn attack.

legendary_actions.name: Shimmering Shield
legendary_actions.desc: The unicorn targets itself or one creature it can see within 60 feet of itself. The target gains 10 (3d6) Temporary Hit Points, and its AC increases by 2 until the end of the unicorn's next turn. The unicorn can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

lair_actions.name: Shimmer of Protection
lair_actions.desc: The unicorn causes shimmering lights to appear in a 30-foot radius centered on a point it can see within 120 feet of it. Each creature of the unicorn's choice in that area gains 10 temporary hit points.

lair_actions.name: Healing Spring
lair_actions.desc: The unicorn targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. A shimmering spring of healing energy wells up beneath the target, restoring 10 (3d6) hit points to the target and ending one disease or one of the following conditions: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

lair_actions.name: Calm Emotions
lair_actions.desc: The unicorn casts calm emotions with a DC 15 saving throw. The spell doesn't require concentration when cast this way.

lair_actions_intro: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the unicorn can take a lair action to cause one of the following effects; the unicorn can't use the same effect two rounds in a row:

regional_effects.name: Memory Loss
regional_effects.desc: Open flames of a nonmagical nature are extinguished within the unicorn's domain. Torches and campfires refuse to burn, but closed lanterns are unaffected.

regional_effects.name: No Tracking
regional_effects.desc: Creatures native to the unicorn's domain have an easier time hiding; they have advantage on all Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide.

regional_effects.name: Endless Sustenance
regional_effects.desc: When a good-aligned creature casts a spell or uses a magical effect that causes another good-aligned creature to regain hit points, the target regains the maximum number of hit points possible for the spell or effect.

regional_effects_intro:
A unicorn's presence sanctifies its forest home. The following magical effects are linked to the unicorn's lair:

If the unicorn dies, these effects fade over the course of 1d10 days.

name: Vampire

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Misty Escape
special_abilities.desc:
If the vampire drops to 0 Hit Points outside its resting place, the vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.
While it has 0 Hit Points in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the Paralyzed condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Points after spending 1 hour there.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

special_abilities.name: Vampire Weakness
special_abilities.desc:
The vampire has these weaknesses:
- Forbiddance: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
- Running Water: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.
- Stake to the Heart: If a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the Incapacitated condition in its resting place, the vampire has the Paralyzed condition until the weapon is removed.
- Sunlight: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

special_abilities.name: Charm (Recharge 5-6)
special_abilities.desc: The vampire casts Charm Person, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17), and the duration is 24 hours. The Charmed target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the vampire.

special_abilities.name: Beguile
special_abilities.desc: The vampire casts Command, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17). The vampire can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
actions.desc: The vampire makes two Grave Strike attacks and uses Bite.

actions.name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of two hands.

actions.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
actions.desc: con DC 17, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition. {@actSaveFail} 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage. The target's Hit Points maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains Hit Points equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a Vampire Spawn under the vampire's control.

legendary_actions.name: Deathless Strike
legendary_actions.desc: The vampire moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Grave Strike attack.

regional_effects.name: Vermin Surge
regional_effects.desc: There's a noticeable increase in the populations of bats, rats, and wolves in the region.

regional_effects.name: Withered Plants
regional_effects.desc: Plants within 500 feet of the lair wither, and their stems and branches become twisted and thorny.

regional_effects.name: Living Shadows
regional_effects.desc: Shadows cast within 500 feet of the lair seem abnormally gaunt and sometimes move as though alive.

regional_effects.name: Creeping Fog
regional_effects.desc: A creeping fog clings to the ground within 500 feet of the vampire's lair. The fog occasionally takes eerie forms, such as grasping claws and writhing serpents.

regional_effects_intro:
The region surrounding a vampire's lair is warped by the creature's unnatural presence, creating any of the following effects:

If the vampire is destroyed, these effects end after 2d6 days.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

special_abilities.name: Vampire Weakness
special_abilities.desc:
The vampire has these weaknesses:
- Forbiddance: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
- Running Water: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.
- Stake to the Heart: The vampire is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the Incapacitated condition.
- Sunlight: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

actions.name: Multiattack

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting (Yuan-ti Form Only)
special_abilities.desc:
The yuan-ti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Animal Friendship (snakes only)
2/day: Suggestion

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The yuan-ti makes two attacks, using Bite or Poison Ray in any combination, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Suggestion if available.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Ray (Yuan-ti Form Only)
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +5, range 120 ft. 12 (2d8 + 3) Poison damage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The yuan-ti has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 10 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

The yuan-ti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The yuan-ti makes two Poison Burst attacks, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Suggestion if available.

actions.name: Poison Burst (Yuan-ti Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 12 (2d8 + 3) Poison damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: str DC 13, one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 21 (4d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

name: Zombie
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
special_abilities.desc: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Points instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d8 + 1) Bludgeoning damage.
